issues.description: Clean guam and clean marrentill are explicitly listed in stepText as needed items (for herblore, likely hourlies), but only appear in unresolvedItems. These are specific resolvable items (IDs: 249, 251) and should be in items[] array.
bullseye lantern is correctly unresolved due to genuine ambiguity (may be sapphire lantern substitute), but herbal items should not be left unresolved.

notes: Quest mapping (LUNAR_DIPLOMACY) is accurate. Core items (tinderbox, swordfish, potions, dramen staff, swamp tar, lunar staff) are correctly mapped with proper quantities where specified. Abstract items (melee gear, cash stack) are appropriately handled. Primary gap: two specific herbal components needed for step progression are relegated to unresolved items instead of being added to items[] with their specific IDs. Confidence penalized due to incompleteness of items list despite correct overall structure.
